Project.NAME: kompakt
Project.keywords: pdf-compression, cli, ghostscript, pypdf, python, desktop, terminal, offline, open-source
Project.annotation: Kompakt — free, private, offline PDF compression desktop CLI. Python-based terminal wizard with fuzzy file search, quality selection (low/medium/high), and dual-engine compression (Ghostscript primary, pypdf fallback). Ships as standalone binaries for macOS, Linux, Windows via PyInstaller.

M-CORE.NAME: pdf_compress
M-CORE.purpose: Interactive terminal PDF compression wizard with fuzzy file search and dual-engine compression
M-CORE.depends: none (pypdf and Ghostscript are optional runtime dependencies)

fn-detect_dependencies.PURPOSE: Scan system for Ghostscript and pypdf availability

fn-get_quality_level.PURPOSE: Interactive quality selection (low/medium/high) with live hints

fn-fuzzy_file_search.PURPOSE: Search PDFs in current directory with fuzzy matching, sort by name/date/size

fn-compress_ghostscript.PURPOSE: Compress PDF via Ghostscript with specified DPI level

fn-compress_pypdf.PURPOSE: Fallback compression via pypdf for lighter savings

fn-run_compression.PURPOSE: Orchestrate compression: detect engine, compress, report stats

export-compress_main.PURPOSE: CLI entry point with argparse and interactive wizard

M-TESTS.NAME: test_pdf_compress
M-TESTS.purpose: Unit and integration tests for compression modules

fn-test_dependency_detection.PURPOSE: Verify Ghostscript and pypdf detection logic

M-BUILD.NAME: ci_build
M-BUILD.purpose: GitHub Actions workflow for building and releasing platform binaries

fn-build_binary.PURPOSE: Build standalone binary via PyInstaller for macOS/Linux/Windows

fn-create_release.PURPOSE: Create GitHub Release with uploaded artifacts
